specs.title: Admin-Editable Billing Plans
specs.archiveNote: Superseded by SPEC-168 (Admin Plan Management). Same feature (runtime-editable plans, DB as source of truth, config as seed) but SPEC-093's core architecture is obsolete: it assumed creating a new billing_plans table + BillingPlanModel extends BaseModel in packages/db. Verified 2026-05-29 that billing_plans already exists (provided by @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle, re-exported in packages/db/src/billing/schemas.ts), the seed already populates it from ALL_PLANS, and a qzpay storage adapter (storage.plans.*) already exists. SPEC-168 keeps the qzpay-backed architecture and absorbs SPEC-093's broader scope (audit log, web cache strategy, operator docs, ADR-020 supersedence). Spec.md retained for reference.

specs.note: SHIPPED via PR #1320 to staging (32/32 tasks). Fixed real read-only data leak: HOST held ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_ALL → could list/view ALL accommodations via the admin endpoints reused by /me/accommodations. Delivered: new ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_OWN tier + server-side forced owner-scoping on adminList (_executeAdminSearch) AND detail/FAQs (adminGetById/adminGetFaqs/checkCanAdminView, non-owned→404 anti-enum) + ownership resolver + 6 /options lookup endpoints (ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN) + admin selector migration + beforeLoad guard on /accommodations. AC-6 audit test = systemic guard. Seed: HOST viewAll→viewOwn; EDITOR rationale (incl. EVENT_VIEW_ALL added by a parallel staging change, blessed in AC-6); CLIENT_MANAGER untouched (tracked debt). Posts documented-only (D7). Docs: ADR-028 + docs/security/permission-model.md + debt-items.md. Live e2e smoke PASSED (HOST list scoped 1/105, non-owned 404, forged ownerId blocked). Verified green: schemas/db/service-core/seed/typecheck. Merged with owner override over preexisting ajeno CI red (admin/lint/build red predates this branch). Per-user permission panel spun off as SPEC-170.

specs.title: Per-User Granular Permission Management Panel
specs.note: IN PROGRESS (worktree spec-170, branch spec/SPEC-170-user-permission-management from staging). Planning COMPLETE: all 6 OQs resolved by owner 2026-05-30 (gating=granular PERMISSION_VIEW/ASSIGN/REVOKE seeded explicit to SUPER_ADMIN; deny overrides IN scope via effect pgEnum column on user_permission; deny never applies to super, API 400 on super target; immediate cache invalidation; picker role-inherited disabled+badge & denyable; posts _OWN deferred per SPEC-169 D7; audit via PERMISSION_CHANGE). tech-analysis.md written (16 sections). Atomized into 31 tasks (avg complexity 2.6, all ≤4). TDD gates: T-006 (actor.ts 10 precedence cases) + T-012 (permission-grouping). GATE task T-007 (deny-resolution) blocks API/UI integration testing. Backend ~95% exists; work = effect column migration + actor.ts resolution rewrite + 3 admin API routes + admin UI picker. Implementation not yet started.

specs.title: AI Foundation Package (provider-agnostic @repo/ai-core)
specs.note: FOUNDATION spec for adding AI to Hospeda. Only the infra: @repo/ai-core package (provider-agnostic, Vercel AI SDK wrapped), admin-managed config (new PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, SUPER_ADMIN), encrypted secrets vault (keys editable from admin, decrypted in apps/api, passed to package by param), usage metering + per-plan entitlement enforcement (login required for ALL AI, no anonymous), cost ceiling + kill-switch + threshold alerts via @repo/notifications, SSE streaming primitive, safety layer (rate-limit + injection guard + moderation + PII scrub for external telemetry), tables in @repo/db (NOT portable — conscious tradeoff, DB access isolated in storage/). Multi-provider = fallback + per-feature routing (V1); advanced routing + vector DB/embeddings + async jobs = V2. 4 V1 features (text improvement, NL search, accommodation chat, admin tech-support) are CHILD specs, out of scope here. Allocated SPEC-173 = max(git=172, engram-stale=144)+1. SS12 mandatory decision protocol: consult owner on ANY ambiguity. Tasks not yet atomized; 7 blocking open questions in spec.md SS8.

specs.title: Entitlements service returns unlimited (-1) for staff without plan
specs.note: Spun off from SPEC-154 PR #1303 Phase 4-A. Frontend shim useShouldShowEntitlementGates in apps/admin checks actor.role to bypass entitlement gates for staff because the backend resolver treats 'no plan' as 'no entitlements'. Move the bypass server-side so motor returns -1 (unlimited) for SUPER_ADMIN/EDITOR sin plan and the frontend shim is deletable. Preferred timing: BEFORE SPEC-154 Phase 6 (propagation) to avoid multiplying the shim. Tasks not yet atomized.

specs.title: Accommodation amenities & features — chips with junction tables (deprecate booleans)
specs.archiveNote: Shipped to staging via 4 staged PRs merged 2026-06-01: #1336 (PR1 junction write path), #1339 (PR2 i18n catalog), #1340 (PR3 admin chips), #1341 (PR4 web reads + search_index + e2e regression test). 30/30 tasks implemented. Original boolean-column premise was FALSE (hasWifi/hasPool never existed as columns; they are virtual search filters) — spec re-scoped to junction-backed multi-select chips. Real-browser smoke GO + e2e regression green.
specs.note: Spun off from SPEC-154 entity view/edit redesign. DB catalog tables (amenity, feature) and junction tables (r_accommodation_amenity, r_accommodation_feature) already exist along with models and read schemas — only write path + admin form + web read migration is missing. Pending owner decisions: Q-1 amenity vs feature distinction, Q-2 isOptional/additionalCost defaults, Q-3 staged vs big-bang rollout, Q-4 catalog i18n shape, Q-5 external consumer audit. Tasks not yet atomized. | RECONCILED 2026-05-30: index said draft but engram had it in-progress AND a physical worktree exists — flipped to in-progress to match reality. BLOCKED: 0 commits, FALSE PREMISE confirmed (NO boolean hasWifi/hasPool columns exist on accommodation; catalog + junction tables already shipped, so the original 'migrate booleans -> drop columns' framing is moot). Real remaining scope = finish junction write path (crud schema amenityIds/featureIds + service _beforeCreate/_beforeUpdate sync + admin chips UI replacing legacy switches + web read migration). Needs re-scope before implementation.

specs.title: Admin Guided Welcome Tour (role-based, config-driven)
specs.note: Role-based guided welcome tour for apps/admin (HOST/EDITOR/ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN). Hybrid UX: Radix Dialog welcome modal + optional driver.js spotlight (dep-policy exception, lazy-loaded). Contextual & separate tours (NO cross-route nav): welcome per role + mini-tours per key section, auto on first visit. Config-driven sibling of SPEC-154 IA config (tour.schema.ts + tours.ts, Zod boot-validated, inline I18nLabel es/en/pt). Catalog v1 = 4 welcome + 15 contextual = 19 tours. SCOPE FINDING: persistence cannot use admin /users PATCH (MANAGE_USERS unassigned to any role; HOST/EDITOR lack USER_READ_ALL per SPEC-169) -> dedicated protected endpoint PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/me/tour-progress with server-side merge into UserSettings.onboarding.adminTours (tourId->seenVersion map). Versioning: auto-offer iff config.version>seen; manual replay ignores version. Touches apps/admin + apps/api + @repo/schemas + @repo/service-core. NOT atomized, implementation NOT started (owner: spec-only for now). Open Qs Q1-Q5 in spec.md sec.15.

specs.title: Admin Plan Management — runtime-editable plans on the DB
specs.completionRef: PR #1338 (feat, setup→integration) + #1347 (fix restore deletedAt no-op) merged to staging. Staging billing smoke + main promotion pending per owner.
specs.note: Canonical replacement for SPEC-093 (now superseded). Runtime-editable billing plans: DB (qzpay billing_plans + billing_prices, via storage adapter) becomes source of truth, @repo/billing config = seed only. Origin: SPEC-143 smoke found admin plans list 502s (transformPlanRecord rejects config flat shape) + Editar/Eliminar/Crear call non-existent endpoints. Verified 2026-05-29: billing_plans table already exists in @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle (id UUID, name=slug, metadata JSON, entitlements array, limits object); seed (billingPlans.seed.ts) already populates from ALL_PLANS idempotently; createBillingAdapter exposes storage.plans.*. Scope: PlanService CRUD via adapter + audit log, API read+write rewrite + public-read switch, @repo/schemas SSOT, admin transformPlanRecord/PlanDialog wiring + header fix, web pricing freshness strategy, operator docs, ADR-020 supersedence. CRITICAL open question: billing_subscriptions.plan_id (varchar) stores slug vs UUID — gates edit/delete referential integrity. Other open Qs: permission model (reuse BILLING_* vs new BILLING_PLAN_*, coordinate SPEC-164), web SSG-vs-endpoint cache, seed re-run policy. Ghost worktree spec/SPEC-168-admin-plan-management points at SPEC-155 commits with untracked spec.md — to be cleaned, fresh worktree on dev start. NOT atomized, implementation NOT started (owner: spec+registry only for now).

specs.title: Admin What's New / Release Notes Dialog
specs.note: Curated-in-repo release-notes feature for admin (v1). Trigger = content publish, NOT deploy/git SHA. Four entry points (auto modal for highlights, topbar badge, panel, dashboard card on all role dashboards) share ONE useWhatsNew() hook. Per-user state in UserSettings.onboarding.whatsNew {baselineAt, seenIds}, lazy-init on first GET (covers existing users, no migration). GET /api/v1/protected/whats-new (role-filtered + computed seen + unseenCount) + dedicated PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/me/whats-new-seen (server-side merge). Sibling of SPEC-174 (shares onboarding JSONB namespace + protected merge pattern, additive so parallel-safe). Content = Zod-validated TS file in apps/api, markdown body sanitized (TipTap read-only, TBD-1), images via CDN URL (TBD-2 origin + CSP img-src). 18 tasks T-001..T-018 across 9 phases. Open: Q1 PermissionEnum, Q2 icon, Q3 sheet modality, Q4/Q5 ListWidget callbacks, TBD-1 renderer, TBD-2 CDN origin.

specs.title: Web color-system fallback for older browsers (oklch/@supports) + admin browser gate
specs.note: Driver BETA-44. Web color system uses oklch(from var()) relative syntax (679 uses/132 files, real floor Chrome 119) -> breaks Chrome 109 cosmetically (login button unstyled). Approach: centralize 42 variant computations into intermediate tokens with sRGB fallback + @supports oklch override; swap 679 call-sites to var(); generalize existing @supports at components.css:539; @repo/icons JS fallback for 5 dynamic badge cases; admin browser-gate banner <Chrome111 (Tailwind v4 hard floor, no fallback). JS proven clean both apps. Seed spec.md written; NOT atomized; impl NOT started. Full analysis engram worktree/linear-issues/beta-44.
specs.archiveNote: SPEC-176 shipped to staging via PR #1346 (16/16). Fixed BETA-44 (Chrome 109 invisible login button): oklch(from var()) relative-color syntax broke pre-Chrome-119. Delivered 254 variant tokens (sRGB :root fallback + @supports oklch override), 658-site codemod, 126 domain alpha tokens + 2-level resolver, dark-mode sRGB block, admin BrowserGateBanner (CSS.supports + i18n es/en/pt), count-pinned CI guard, visual parity <=3/255. Linear BETA-44 closed Done. Marta retest pending staging->prod promotion.

specs.title: Self-Hosted Runner for PR CI (GitHub Actions cost/quota reduction)
PostHog Reverse Proxy — first-party analytics ingestion (web)
specs.note: Driver BETA-77. Web PostHog sends events directly to us.i.posthog.com — blocked by ad-blockers (est. 25-35% desktop loss in Argentina). Solution: Cloudflare Worker proxying /ingest/* on hospeda.com.ar to PostHog Cloud US. Web-only (admin out of scope). CRITICAL coupling: CSP in middleware-helpers.ts hardcodes the PostHog external hosts; removing them and changing PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST must be atomic with the Worker already live. 11 tasks across 4 phases: phase-worker (Worker + wrangler + test), phase-app (CSP + env-registry + CSP regression test), phase-docs, phase-verify (owner ops + smoke). T-010/T-011 are owner-only manual actions.

specs.title: Vitest Test-Suite Performance — Cut Per-File Overhead Without Saturating the Machine
